column1: Their [Men in their Prime] lives will be guided not by the sole consideration either of what is noble or of what is useful

**Prodigality**: (Webster) Extravagance in the expenditure of what one possesses; profusion; waste; excessive liberality. /ˌprɒdɪˈɡæləti/
